## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / tech debt
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Provider / integration

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` pass
- [ ] `mypy app/` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes and new behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Docs / `.env.example` updated if configuration changed
- [ ] No patient data, secrets, or API keys included in the diff
